events.name: 1. FC Union Berlin at FC Cologne

headlines.description: RB Leipzig played out a 1-1 home draw with Werder Bremen in the Bundesliga on Saturday after Benjamin Sesko cancelled out Nicolas Seiwald's own goal to extend their unbeaten run to 10 games.
headlines.shortLinkText: RB Leipzig extend unbeaten run thanks to Sesko strike
